title: 弥生賞の後に・燃えたッ！

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I did it, I did it! I won against Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that was a thrill! Racing her is tough, so it
gets me nervous.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... I'm so happy... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whoaaaa! Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Um, today's race was... well, really great!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Great? As in, "Well done, you tried"? Is that what
you mean?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, don't give me that!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No, no, no!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Even before we left the gates, I could feel this
force coming from you—it was your drive to win!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I was kinda scared. You looked really
big in the moment—like, HUGE!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But... that's why I knew I reaaaally didn't want to
lose, either!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I got super fired up during this race. That's why it was really, really great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's eyes flicker when she hears
Winning Ticket's passionate explanation.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I won't let you win next time. The Satsuki
Sho's mine!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Same here!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Haha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket won against Narita Taishin this
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next race will be the Satsuki Sho—it's time for
BNW to start preparing!
